title: lecythidaceae
intro: The lecythidaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the pea family, which includes approximately 250 species of trees and shrubs. This family is characterized by its unique flowers, which are typically pea-like in appearance, and its pods, which are often flat and contain multiple seeds. The lecythidaceae family is found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world, and includes species such as the Brazil nut tree and the golden bean tree. The plants within this family are often valued for their timber, seeds, and medicinal properties.
